name: hoc/data-table
description: A high-level data-table HOC that wires together Tanstack Table primitives (sorting, filtering, pagination, row selection), a toolbar, loading skeletons, and empty-state handling. Accepts ColumnDef arrays, a data accessor, and optional toolbar configuration. Composed of Card, Skeleton, TanstackTable sub-components, DataTableToolbar, and EmptyState primitives with full i18n support via ConfigProvider.
useCases: Admin user-management grids with search, column visibility toggles, and bulk-delete actions
E-commerce order dashboards combining filters, date-range pickers, and paginated row lists
Analytics event logs with sortable timestamps, faceted severity badges, and CSV export
CRM opportunity pipelines showing multi-select checkboxes and inline status dropdown edits
